headline: 5 Goldman Sachs Top Picks for May Are Safe, Pay Dividends With Double-Digit Upside
summary: Founded in 1869, Goldman Sachs is the world’s second-largest investment bank by revenue and is ranked 82nd on the Fortune 500 list of the largest U.S. corporations by total revenue. The Wall Street white-glove firm offers financing, advisory services, risk distribution, and hedging for the firm’s institutional and corporate clients. headline: The Bull Case For Goldman Sachs Group (GS) Could Change Following Its US$1.5 Billion Anthropic AI Venture
summary: On 4 May 2026, Anthropic, Blackstone, Hellman & Friedman, and Goldman Sachs announced a new US$1.50 billion AI-native enterprise services firm that will embed Anthropic’s Claude models into mid-sized companies across sectors such as healthcare, manufacturing, financial services, and real estate. The venture effectively turns Goldman Sachs and its private equity partners into a large-scale distribution channel for Anthropic’s AI, giving Goldman deep access to real-world enterprise adoption...
